message:
fix(core): gate StatementReuseTraceState::clear behind cfg(test)

Dead-code lint fix: `StatementReuseTraceState::clear` is only
called from the test-only `Connection::reset_statement_reuse_trace`
helper, which is itself `#[cfg(test)]`. With the non-test build
the method is unused and triggers a dead_code warning.

Gate the method with `#[cfg(test)]` so production builds no
longer carry the dead function and the warning disappears. The
test-only `reset_statement_reuse_trace` helper continues to
work unchanged because it is also gated on `#[cfg(test)]`.

No behavior change.
